data.biography:
Уотерстон родилась в Вестминстере, Лондон, в семье актёра Сэма Уотерстона и бывшей модели. После обучения актёрской профессии в школе искусств Тиш Нью-Йоркского университета, она начала свою карьеру на экране и впоследствии появилась в нескольких независимых фильмах.

В конце 2000-х Уотерстон перебралась в Лос-Анджелес, где выступала на театральной сцене, а также исполнила небольшие роли в фильмах «Штурмуя Вудсток» и «Быть Флинном». В 2012 году она появилась в нескольких эпизодах сериала HBO «Подпольная империя». Прорывом в её карьере стала роль второго плана в фильме 2014 года «Врождённый порок», которая принесла ей номинацию на премию «Спутник». После этого она получила ведущую роль наравне с Элизабет Мосс в фильме «Королева Земли», а также роль экс-супруги главного героя в байопике «Стив Джобс».

В 2016 году Уотерстон исполняет главную женскую роль в фильме «Фантастические твари и где они обитают», спин-оффе серии фильмов о Гарри Поттере. Картина вышла в прокат 18 ноября 2016 года. Ещё одну главную роль она получила в фильме Ридли Скотта «Чужой: Завет», сиквеле «Прометея».
data.name: Кэтрин Уотерстон

data.biography:
Katherine Boyer Waterston 1980. március 3-án született Londonban, brit születésű amerikai színésznő, Lynn Louisa egykori modell és Sam Waterston gyermeke, testvérei a szintén színésznő Elisabeth Waterston és a rendező Graham Waterston. Féltestvére, James Waterston szintén színész. A New York University Tisch School of the Arts-on szerezte diplomáját.

Filmszerepei között említésre méltó a Michael Clayton, The Babysitters, Mocsokváros utcáin, a Sötét húzások és a Beépített hiba. Szerepelt a Boardwalk Empire c. televíziósorozatban, és legújabban a Cseresznyéskert Off-Broadway átiratában is.

Katherine Boyer Waterston (* 3. März 1980 in London) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Waterston wurde als Tochter von Lynn Louisa (geborene Woodruff) und des Schauspielers Sam Waterston in London geboren, wo ihre US-amerikanischen Eltern zu dieser Zeit arbeiteten.

Ab Mitte der 2000er Jahre übernahm sie erste Rollen in Film- und Fernsehproduktionen. 2007 spielte sie eine kleine Nebenrolle in Tony Gilroys Michael Clayton, welches gleichzeitig ihr Kinodebüt darstellte. Es folgten regelmäßig weitere Auftritte als Nebendarstellerin in verschiedenen Filmproduktionen, ehe Waterston in der Filmbiographie Steve Jobs (2015) erstmals eine größere Rolle übernehmen konnte. 2016 spielte sie in dem Harry Potter-Prequel Phantastische Tierwesen und wo sie zu finden sind die Porpentina Goldstein, welches ihre erste große Hauptrolle darstellte. Die Rolle der Zauberin übernahm Waterston auch in der Fortsetzung Phantastische Tierwesen: Grindelwalds Verbrechen (2018). 2017 übernahm sie zudem die Hauptrolle der Daniels in Ridley Scotts Science-Fiction-Film Alien: Covenant.  Quelle: Wikipedia

Katherine Boyer Waterston (née le 3 mars 1980) est une actrice américaine. Elle a fait ses débuts au cinéma dans Michael Clayton (2007). Elle a ensuite eu des rôles de soutien dans des films tels que Robot & Frank, Being Flynn (tous deux en 2012) et The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Her (2013) avant de jouer le rôle principal de Shasta Fay Hepworth dans Inherent Vice de Paul Thomas Anderson (2014). En 2015, elle a interprété Chrisann Brennan dans Steve Jobs. Elle avait des rôles principaux dans la préquelle de Harry Potter, Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them (2016) et Alien: Covenant (2017), une préquelle de la série de films Alien de Ridley Scott.

Katherine Waterson dorastała w małym miasteczku w Connecticut. Wychowała się w aktorskiej rodzinie. Często odwiedzała w telewizji i na planie swojego ojca Sama Watersona. Studiowała na Uniwersytecie w Nowym Jorku gdzie specjalizowała się w sztuce teatralnej i fotografii. Jednak z powodu zbyt dużego obciążenia pracą na obu kierunkach, Waterson skupiła się tylko na teatrze, podążając śladami rodziny. Aktorka po raz pierwszy stanęła przed kamerami w filmie Orchids w 2006 roku, po czym dostała małą rolę u boku Georga Clooneya w filmie Michael Clayton. Z niewielkim dorobkiem filmowym Katherine otrzymała główną rolę w filmie The Babysitters w 2007 roku. Zagrała w nim razem z Cynthią Nixon i Johnem Leguizamo. Rok później zagrała w filmie Good Dick, w którym wystąpiła razem ze swoją siostrą Elisabeth Waterson.

Katherine Boyer Waterston é uma atriz norte-americana, nascida no Reino Unido. Ela é mais conhecida por seus papéis em The Babysitters, Inherent Vice, Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them e Alien: Covenant.

Katherine Boyer Waterston, 3 Mart 1980 tarihinde Westminster, Londra'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatla iç içe bir ailede büyüyen Waterston, efsanevi Amerikalı aktör Sam Waterston'ın kızıdır. Oyunculuk tutkusunun peşinden giderek New York Üniversitesi'nin prestijli Tisch Sanat Okulu'ndan (Tisch School of the Arts) mezun olmuştur.

Kariyerine 2000'li yılların ortalarında New York tiyatro sahnelerinde ve bağımsız filmlerde aldığı küçük rollerle başladı. "Michael Clayton" (2007) gibi beğeni toplayan filmlerde kısa süreli görünse de, on yıla yakın bir süre boyunca istikrarlı bir şekilde zanaatını geliştirerek ve daha çok tiyatroya odaklanarak deneyim kazandı.

Katherine Waterston'ın kariyerindeki dönüm noktası, usta yönetmen Paul Thomas Anderson'ın 2014 yapımı "Gizli Kusur" (Inherent Vice) filmiyle geldi. Bu filmde canlandırdığı gizemli ve çekici Shasta Fay Hepworth karakteriyle eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı ve sinema dünyasında geniş çapta tanındı. Bu rol, onun aranan bir başrol oyuncusu olmasının önünü açtı.

Bu büyük çıkışın ardından kariyeri hızla yükselişe geçti. 2015'te Danny Boyle'un yönettiği "Steve Jobs" filminde Steve Jobs'ın eski sevgilisi Chrisann Brennan'ı canlandırdı. Ancak onu küresel bir yıldıza dönüştüren en önemli adımlardan biri, J.K. Rowling'in Wizarding World evreninde geçen "Fantastik Canavarlar" serisi oldu. 2016 yapımı "Fantastik Canavarlar Nelerdir, Nerede Bulunurlar?" (Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them) ve devam filmlerinde canlandırdığı zeki ve kararlı seherbaz Porpentina "Tina" Goldstein karakteriyle milyonlarca izleyicinin tanıdığı bir yüz haline geldi.

Aynı dönemde, Ridley Scott'ın yönetmenliğinde "Alien: Covenant" (2017) filminde başrolü üstlenerek bilimkurgu ve aksiyon türündeki yeteneğini de kanıtladı.

Büyük bütçeli yapımların yanı sıra bağımsız sinemadaki köklerine de sadık kalan Waterston, "The World to Come" (2020) gibi eleştirmenlerce beğenilen dram filmlerinde rol aldı. Son yıllarda Damien Chazelle'in "Babil" (Babylon) (2022) filminde ve HBO'nun başarılı dizisi "Perry Mason"ın (2023) ikinci sezonunda yer alarak çok yönlü bir oyuncu olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

凯瑟琳·博耶·沃特斯顿（Katherine Boyer Waterston，1980年3月3日-），英裔美国女演员，资深演员山姆·沃特斯顿的女儿。她在迈克尔·克莱顿 （Michael Clayton） （2007） 中首次亮相。她在《机器人与弗兰克》、《成为弗林》（2012 年）和《埃莉诺·里格比的消失》（2013 年）等电影中担任配角，然后在《固有罪恶》（2014 年）中取得突破性表演。她在史蒂夫·乔布斯 （2015） 中饰演克里斯安·布伦南，并继续出演《神奇动物在哪里》（2016 年）及其续集。她的其他电影角色包括《异形：盟约》（2017 年）、《洛根幸运》（2017 年）、《当前战争》（2017 年）、《90 年代中期》（2018 年）和《未来世界》（2020 年）。
data.name: 凯瑟琳·沃特斯顿

data.biography: Film and stage actor Derek Phillips was born in Miami, Florida on April 18, 1976, and attended Baylor University where he received a BFA in acting. Upon graduation Derek moved to New York and began acting professionally in both television and regional theatre performing throughout the country in numerous plays including "The Winter's Tale" (Baltimore Center Stage), "Of Mice and Men" (Dallas Theater Center), "The Glass Menagerie" (Virginia Stage Company), and "King o' The Moon" (Capital Repertory Theatre). After years of regional theatre and recurring roles on "The Guiding Light", "As the World Turns", and "All My Children" Derek finally got his break playing the emotionally charged role of Billy Riggins on the critically acclaimed NBC television show "Friday Night Lights." Derek is also an associate producer, assistant director and resident actor for the award-winning, ensemble based theatre company Second Thought Theatre, where he has performed as an actor in the regional premiere of Eric Bogosian's "Humpty Dumpty", Douglas Post's "Earth and Sky", and the world premiere of Steven Walters "Pluck the Day."
data.name: Derek Phillips

Grand career in the entertainment business started in 2008, when she was chosen to become one of the hostesses in the Thai variety show “Strawberry Cheesecake”. In 2009, she auditioned for The Star season 5. Having exceptional skills as a dancer and singer, she was dubbed “Wonder Grand” in respect to the Wonder Girls of Korea. Despite all of the high expectations of the commentators, Grand was voted off of The Star season 5 and was the fifth runner up out of eight contestants who made it into the house after auditioning.

data.biography:
Giles was born in Harrogate, Yorkshire, UK. He has recently directed 'The Dare', 'Knights of Camelot' 'World of Darkness' and 'Food For Thought' and produced 'A Serial Killers Guide To Life' and 'Cassette' feature films. He starred in the films, I Want Candy, The Torment, The Harsh Light of Day, The Damned United and is the founder Figi Productions where he has produced and directed eight award winning films including, 'The Heart of the Forest', '47 Cleveland' 'Taken' 'Barry Brown' and the first 3D short drama to be filmed in the UK 'Sportsday 3D'. He is now in prep for his drama feature 'The Nobodies' and is in the edit 'Knights of Camelot' and soon to be released his writing and directing debut; the psychological horror feature 'The Dare' which won the Audience Award at Popcorn Frights Film Festival, starring Richard Brake, Alexandra Evans, Richard Short, Bart Edwards and Robert Maaser for Millennium Films and B2Y.

After he gained a 2:1 at The University in Hertfordshire he trained at Drama Studio London. His first major role was playing Carl in Ealing Studio's 'I Want Candy', with Mackenzie Crook and Tom Burke. Since he has played the lead in the British horror, 'The Torment' (released as 'The Possession of David O'Reilly' in the US). He also was the lead in The Harsh Light of Day'. Other films include: 'Between Two Worlds', 'The Banksy Job', 'Hero', 'Tales of The Supernatural' and the Zombie Comedy 'Stalled'. He played Coin Todd in 'The Damned United' for BBC Films with Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall and Jim Broadbent, directed by Tom Hooper (The Kings Speech). Dorian in 'Walking with the Enemy' with Ben Kingsley. He played the lead role of Vincent in vampire feature 'Night Junkies', Joel in 'Three Minutes Moments, and FBI Agent Kyle Fraser in the sci-fi film 'LVJ'. He also played the popular role of Steve, the cult loving and troubled character on the BAFTA nominated, London based interactive drama series 'KateModern', The show won a Webby and a Press Guild award winner for innovation in broadcasting and was nominated for three BAFTA's. His character also crossed over to the American sister show 'LonelyGirl15' for a season. TV includes: Blackpool, Coronation Street, The Great War, Tricks, 50 Ways, The Silence and Accidental Farmer.

He is a member of The Soho Theater and The Royal Court Theaters Young Writers program, where he has had three of his plays read, two of which, White and Cracking Up where fully performed at Off West End theaters. His latest play On The Tiles had a performance at The Prince of Wales Theater in London's West End. He plays football for Arsenal Ex Pros and Celebrities Charity XI and was top goal-scorer in 2018 and 2019.

data.biography:
杨杏（1990年3月23日—），中国内地女演员。出生于山东济南。毕业于中央戏剧学院。2011年，在王立新执导的探讨贞洁观与爱情题材电影《完美的爱》中饰演女主角刘小芳。在朱一龙、杨净如、于清斌主演的冒险喜剧电影《猎野人》中饰演安楠。联合郭郁滨、陈真希主演的民国侦探数字电影《铁面人》于11月11日首映。

　　2012年，主演孙传林执导的电影《偷说我爱你》，在片中饰演失明女孩晓晓。

　　2013年，搭档谢容儿、李艾佳、邢增婧主演青春剧爱情剧《我们都是坏孩子》。

　　在贾乃亮、袁姗姗主演的家庭偶像轻喜剧《家有喜妇》中饰演李玉。

　　2014年出演中泰合拍心理悬疑巨制，中国首部人格分裂小清新惊悚电影《恐怖将映》，饰演女主角苏璇。

　　2015年，与李幼斌、何明翰领衔主演的见义勇为题材剧《别让我看见》登陆中央卫视及陕西卫视，在剧中饰演反派人物娟娟。

　　2017年，主演电视剧《向南有小雨》，饰演女二号“叛逆少女”二影。同年，出演荆小尧执导的网剧《陈二狗的妖孽人生》第二部，饰演乔麦。

　　2018年，主演革命题材献礼电视剧《觉醒年代》。同年，主演由荆小尧执导的《我叫赵甲第》，在剧中饰演女一号齐冬草
data.name: 杨杏

Nora began acting in television and film while she was a student at the Berlin Arts University, where she graduated in 2007. She won the Bunte Magazine "New Faces" award for best young German actress in 2009, and received the Max Ophüls Prize for "Most Promising Actress" in January 2010. Nora is a descendant of the famous Martha Elizabeth, Baroness Von Waldstätten, who was Mozart's patroness and protector. The Baroness facilitated Mozart's wedding to his beloved Constanza over his father Leopold's objections, and later became a character in the Austrian musical "Mozart" by Michael Kunze.

Nora von Waldstätten nasce a Vienna (Austria). 37enne, il prossimo 1 Dicembre, nasce sotto il segno del Sagittario.

La sua principale attività nel mondo del cinema è quella di interprete e tra i lavori più interessanti possiamo citare la partecipazione nel film October, November (2013) di Götz Spielmann.

Nel 2010 ha inoltre lavorato con Olivier Assayas per la realizzazione del film Carlos - Prima parte dove ha interpretato la parte di Magdalena Kopp.

data.biography:
Vladimir Jon Cubrt is a writer, film producer and actor. As an actor, Vladimir is known around the world for his portrayal of Garret Jacob Hobbs on NBC's hit series Hannibal and is a regular guest at "Fannibal" conventions in North America and Europe. Vladimir has appeared in over 40 television shows and films including: Designated Survivor; In Contempt; Covert Affairs; Hollywoodland and Beauty & The Beast. In 2018 Vladimir was featured in three films that premiered at the biggest film festivals in North America: Stockholm (Tribeca); Kodachrome (TIFF); and Luba (Cinequest and Michael Moore's Traverse City Film Festival). Vladimir was nominated for a 2019 ACTRA Award for Best Male Performance for his portrayal of Luba's embattled ex-husband, Donnie Marchuk. Vladimir founded stage production company Zocalo Toronto, writing and producing a number of original works between 2007 and 2012 including The Weeping Salsa, a dance-drama hybrid in which he also starred.

Vladimir was born in Hamllton, Ontario and went to Etobicoke School of the Arts before graduating from Ryerson University's theatre program.

data.biography:
Mikael Åke Persbrandt, born 25 September 1963) is a Swedish actor. In Swedish films, he is perhaps best known for playing Gunvald Larsson in the Beck series of movies. He is internationally known for his starring role in the Academy Award-winning feature, In a Better World, directed by Susanne Bier. His performance earned him a 2011 European Film Award nomination for Best Actor. Other parts include the role of Carl Hamilton from the novels by Jan Guillou, Beorn in The Hobbit, as well as Jakob Nyman in the English TV series Sex Education.

He has performed onstage with the Royal Dramatic Theatre in Stockholm and in numerous film and TV roles. Persbrandt is well known for his role as the hardboiled police inspector Gunvald Larsson, in the Beck series of films. He won the Guldbagge Award for Best Actor in a leading role twice, the first in 2009 for Everlasting Moments and the second in 2014 for Nobody Owns Me. In 2015, Persbrandt reported that he would quit starring in his popular role of Gunvald Larsson. In 2019, Persbrandt began playing Jakob Nyman in the Netflix comedy drama Sex Education. He was a leading actor in the film The Salvation.
data.name: Mikael Persbrandt

Michelle Hurd (born December 21, 1966) is an American stage, film, and television actress. She is married to actor Garret Dillahunt.

Michelle Hurd is the daughter of actor Hugh L. Hurd. She graduated from Saint Ann's School in 1984 and Boston University in 1988, and studied with the Alvin Ailey School. After her graduation from college, she studied at Great Britain's National Theatre .

Her Broadway credits include the 1996 Stephen Sondheim-George Furth flop Getting Away with Murder. Other theater credits include Othello, A.M.L., Hamlet, The Hunchback of Notre Dame and Looking for the Pony  at Manhattan Theater Source with her sister Adrienne Hurd. She met her husband, Garret Dillahunt, in 900 Oneonta at Circle Repertory Theater Company. She has won several awards, including the Robbie Award and the California Theatre Award for Best Supporting Actress in a Drama for the premiere of Richard Greenberg's The Violet Hour.

She has also appeared in several movies, including Random Hearts, Personals and as the comic book superhero B.B. DaCosta/Fire in the unshown TV-pilot Justice League of America (1997). After working in television roles such as The Cosby Mysteries, New York Undercover and The Practice, she appeared in a 1997 episode of Law & Order. Her performance as a corrupt FBI informant caught the attention of L&O producer Dick Wolf, who two years later cast her in the spin-off Law & Order: Special Victims Unit as Det. Monique Jeffries. She co-starred with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay for the first season before leaving the series in 2000, but she did appear in the first, seventh and sixteenth episodes of season two, her final appearance being in March 2001. In 2001, she appeared in the Showtime original series Leap Years, where her character was the on and off love interest of a bisexual character played by her real-life husband.

Television roles include parts in Charmed, The O.C., According to Jim, Shark, Bones and Gossip Girl. In 2006 - 2007, she had a recurring role on ER as television news producer Courtney Brown, who became close to Dr. Kerry Weaver.

She played Diana, the leading rôle, in the Washington Shakespeare Theatre Company's 10 February–29 March 2009 production of Lope de Vega's Dog in the Manger.

She won a Robbie Award as "best actress" for her work in the world premiere of The Violet Hour at South Coast Repertory. She played in Hamlet at the North Shore Theater.

In 2010, Hurd began a starring role on the A&E Network drama The Glades, playing Colleen Manus.
data.name: Michelle Hurd

米歇尔·赫德（Michelle Hurd，1966年12月21日-），美国舞台、电影、电视女演员。她嫁给了演员加勒特·迪拉亨特。

米歇尔·赫德（Michelle Hurd）是演员休·赫德（Hugh L. Hurd）的女儿。她于1984年毕业于圣安学校，1988年毕业于波士顿大学，并就读于阿尔文·艾利学校。大学毕业后，她就读于英国国家剧院。

她的百老汇作品包括 1996 年斯蒂芬·桑德海姆-乔治·弗斯 （Stephen Sondheim-George Furth） 的失败作品《逃脱谋杀》。其他戏剧作品包括《奥赛罗》、《A.M.L.》、《哈姆雷特》、《巴黎圣母院的驼背》和与她的妹妹阿德里安·赫德在曼哈顿剧院源头寻找小马。她在 900 Oneonta 的 Circle Repertory Theater Company 遇到了她的丈夫 Garret Dillahunt。她曾因理查德·格林伯格（Richard Greenberg）的《紫罗兰时刻》（The Violet Hour）的首演而获得罗比奖（Robbie Award）和加州戏剧奖（California Theatre Award）最佳戏剧女配角奖（California Theatre Award for Best Supporting Actress in a Drama）。

她还出演了几部电影，包括 Random Hearts、Personals，并在未上映的电视试播《美国正义联盟》（1997 年）中饰演漫画超级英雄 B.B. DaCosta/Fire。在出演《考斯比之谜》、《纽约卧底》和《实践》等电视角色后，她出现在1997年的《法律与秩序》中。她作为腐败的联邦调查局线人的表现引起了L&O制片人迪克·沃尔夫（Dick Wolf）的注意，两年后，迪克·沃尔夫（Dick Wolf）将她选为衍生剧《法律与秩序：特殊受害者》（Law & Order： Special Victims Unit）中的莫妮克·杰弗里斯（Monique Jeffries）。在 2000 年离开该系列之前，她与克里斯托弗·梅洛尼和玛丽斯卡·哈吉泰共同主演了第一季，但她确实出现在第二季的第一集、第七集和第十六集中，最后一次露面是在 2001 年 3 月。2001 年，她出现在 Showtime 原创剧集《闰年》中，她的角色是她现实生活中的丈夫扮演的双性恋角色的断断续续的恋人。

电视角色包括 Charmed、The O.C.、据吉姆、鲨鱼、骨头和绯闻女孩中的角色。2006 年至 2007 年，她在急诊室担任电视新闻制片人考特尼·布朗 （Courtney Brown），他与克里·韦弗 （Kerry Weaver） 博士关系密切。

2009年2月10日至3月29日，她在华盛顿莎士比亚剧团制作的洛佩·德·维加（Lope de Vega）的《马槽里的狗》（Dog in the Manger）中扮演女主角戴安娜。

她因在南海岸剧目剧目《紫罗兰时刻》全球首演中的表演而获得罗比奖“最佳女演员”奖。她在北岸剧院演出《哈姆雷特》。

2010 年，赫德开始在 A&E 网络电视剧《林间空地》中担任主演，饰演科琳·马努斯。
data.name: 米歇尔·赫德

米歇爾·赫德（Michelle Hurd）是演員休·赫德（Hugh L.Hurd）的女兒。她於 1984 年畢業於聖安學校，1988 年畢業於波士頓大學，並就讀於阿爾文·艾利學校。大學畢業後，她就讀於英國國家劇院。

她的百老匯作品包括 1996 年斯蒂芬·桑德海姆 - 喬治·弗斯 （Stephen Sondheim - George Furth） 的失敗作品《逃脱謀殺》。其他戲劇作品包括《奧賽羅》、《A.M. L. 》、《王子復仇記》、《巴黎聖母院的駝背》和與她的妹妹阿德裏安·赫德在曼哈頓劇院源頭尋找小馬。她在 900 Oneonta 的 Circle Repertory Theater Company 遇到了她的丈夫 Garret Dillahunt。她曾因理查德·格林伯格（Richard Greenberg）的《紫羅蘭時刻》（The Violet Hour）的首演而獲得羅比獎（Robbie Award）和加州戲劇獎（California Theatre Award）最佳戲劇女配角獎（California Theatre Award for Best Supporting Actress in a Drama）。

她還出演了幾部電影，包括 Random Hearts、Personals，並在未上映的電視試播《美國正義聯盟》（1997 年）中飾演漫畫超級英雄 B.B. DaCosta/Fire。在出演《考斯比之謎》、《紐約卧底》和《實踐》等電視角色後，她出現在 1997 年的《法律與秩序》中。她作為腐敗的聯邦調查局線人的表現引起了 L&O 製片人迪克·沃爾夫（Dick Wolf）的注意，兩年後，迪克·沃爾夫（Dick Wolf）將她選為衍生劇《法律與秩序：特殊受害者》（Law & Order： Special Victims Unit）中的莫妮克·傑弗里斯（Monique Jeffries）。在 2000 年離開該系列之前，她與克里斯託弗·梅洛尼和瑪麗斯卡·哈吉泰共同主演了第一季，但她確實出現在第二季的第一集、第七集和第十六集中，最後一次露面是在 2001 年 3 月。2001 年，她出現在 Showtime 原創劇集《求愛吉日》中，她的角色是她現實生活中的丈夫扮演的雙性戀角色的斷斷續續的戀人。

電視角色包括 Charmed、The O.C. 、據吉姆、鯊魚、骨頭和緋聞女孩中的角色。2006 年至 2007 年，她在急診室擔任電視新聞製片人考特尼·布朗 （Courtney Brown），他與克裏·韋弗 （Kerry Weaver） 博士關係密切。

2009 年 2 月 10 日至 3 月 29 日，她在華盛頓莎士比亞劇團製作的洛佩·德·維加（Lope de Vega）的《馬槽裏的狗》（Dog in the Manger）中扮演女主角戴安娜。

她因在南海岸劇目劇目《紫羅蘭時刻》全球首演中的表演而獲得羅比獎“最佳女演員”獎。她在北岸劇院演出《王子復仇記》。

2010 年，赫德開始在 A&E 網絡電視劇《林間空地》中擔任主演，飾演科琳·馬努斯。

data.overview: Phim Chọc Phải Điện Hạ Lạnh Lùng kể về tiểu thư nhà giàu Trần Thanh Thanh muốn trốn việc sắp xếp hôn nhân của dòng họ, nghe lời khuyên của ông nội :"Ở thời điểm con xấu xí nhất, vẫn có người nguyện ý thích con, đó mới là chân ái" nên đã che giấu thân phận cùng khuôn mặt thật của mình, đi vào Vân Thành tìm tìm yêu đích thực . Ở đây cô cùng nam thần tượng yêu nghiệt Tư Đồ Phong ngoài ý muốn trở thành bạn cùng bàn. Tại đây, cô khiến cho Đồ Phong chú ý đến, hàng ngày hai người đấu võ mồm khắp nơi trong trường dần dần nảy sinh tình cảm, càng ngày càng sâu sắc, sau đó cũng tiết lộ câu chuyện về mối tình đầu của Tư Đồ Phong trên con đường của những giấc mơ âm nhạc.

data.biography:
Alfie Evan Allen (born September 12, 1986) is an English actor, best known for his role as Theon Greyjoy on the HBO fantasy series Game of Thrones (2011–2019), for which he received a nomination for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Drama Series in 2019. In film, he is best known for his starring roles in John Wick (2014), The Predator (2018), and Jojo Rabbit (2019).

His older sister is singer Lily Allen. Allen's first professional appearance was in a one-off Channel 4 comedy, You Are Here in 1998. The same year, Allen and his sister Lily appeared in the 1998 film, Elizabeth, which was produced by their mother. His early work included small roles in Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London, Atonement and BBC1's historical hospital drama, Casualty 1907. In 2008, he took over Daniel Radcliffe's role in the stage play, Equus. He has continued to work in films, appearing in Soulboy, The Kid, Freestyle and Powder in 2010. In 2012, he starred in the British thriller, Confine.
data.name: Alfie Allen

data.biography:
Аллен Альфи

Английский актёр. Наиболее известен ролью Теона Грейджоя в телесериале «Игра престолов».

Дебютировал в эпизоде сериала «The Comic Strip Presents» в 1988 году. Затем, после долгого перерыва в 10 лет, появился в телевизионной комедии Channel 4 «You Are Here» в 1998, в соавторстве Ричарда Лукаса и Дэвид Уолльямс. Его отец Кит Аллен, Салли Филлипс и Джон Ронсон также участвовали в создании фильма. Аллен появился вместе со своей сестрой Лили в небольшой роли в кинокартине 1998 года «Елизавета», спродюсированной его матерью. Упоминается в титрах как Arundel’s Son.

В дальнейшем снимался в фильмах «Агент Коди Бэнкс 2: Пункт назначения Лондон» где режиссёром выступал его дядя Кевин Аллен и «Искупление», экранизации романа Иэна Макьюэна. Появился в исторической драме телеканала BBC1 «Лондонский госпиталь», в роли Нобби Кларка.

Начиная с 31 января 2008 года, с Чичестера он заменил Дэниела Рэдклиффа в пьесе «Эквус», возобновляя её гастроли по стране.

В апреле 2009, он снялся вместе с Джэми Уинстон в видеоклипе на песню «Dust Devil» группы Madness. У него также была роль в телефильме канала BBC2 «Свободное падение».

В августе 2009 было объявлено что Аллен сыграет Теона Грейджоя в телесериале HBO «Игра престолов», по серии книг Джорджа Мартина «Песнь Льда и Огня». Изначально актёр проходил пробы на роль Джона Сноу.

В 2010 году участвовал в фильмах «Powder», «Дитя» и «Парень с душой».

В феврале 2017 Альфи Аллен присоединился к актёрскому составу фильма «Хищник», выход которого запланирован на 2018 год
data.name: Альфи Аллен

data.biography:
Alfie Evan James Allen (* 12. September 1986 in Hammersmith, London) ist ein britischer Schauspieler.

Seine erste eigentliche Schauspielrolle folgte 1998 im Historienfilm Elizabeth. Nach einigen Nebenrollen, unter anderem in Agent Cody Banks 2: Mission London und Abbitte, übernahm er Daniel Radcliffes Rolle in dem Theaterstück Equus. Allen spielte von 2011 bis 2019 die Rolle des Theon Graufreud (Theon Greyjoy im Englischen) in der HBO-Serie Game of Thrones, die auf der Romanserie Das Lied von Eis und Feuer von George R. R. Martin beruht, die ihn international bekannt machte. Allen verbuchte bereits einige Filmauftritte, unter anderem im Drama SoulBoy von 2010, das sich mit der Northern Soul-Szene beschäftigt, in John Wick (2014) und Predator - Upgrade (2018).  Quelle: Wikipedia

Alfie Evan James Allen (11 de septiembre de 1986) es un actor británico, conocido por su papel de Theon Greyjoy en la serie de HBO Juego de Tronos, y también por dar vida a Iosef Tarasov en John Wick: Otro Día para Matar.

Alfie Allen se narodil v londýnském Hammersmithu. Jeho starší sestrou je zpěvačka Lily Allen. Allen se poprvé profesionálně objevil v jednorázové komedii stanice Channel 4 You Are Here v roce 1998. Ve stejném roce se Allen a jeho sestra Lily objevili ve filmu Elizabeth z roku 1998, který produkovala jejich matka. Mezi jeho rané práce patřily malé role ve filmech Agent Cody Banks 2, Pokání a v historickém nemocničním dramatu Casualty 1907 na BBC1. V roce 2008 převzal roli Daniela Radcliffa v divadelní hře Equus. V současné době je nejznámější díky roli Theona Greyjoye v seriálovém hitu HBO Hra o trůny.  Allen pokračuje v práci ve filmech, v roce 2010 se objevil ve filmech Soulboy, Kid, Freestyle a Powder. V roce 2012 si zahrál v připravovaném britském thrilleru Confine.

阿尔菲·艾伦（Alfie Allen），1986年9月12日出生于英国伦敦汉默史密斯，英国男演员。

1988年登上小银幕，在电视剧《The Comic Strip Presents...》饰演了一个婴儿。随后在电影《伊丽莎白》里饰演了小角色。斯嘉丽·约翰逊主演的电影《另一个波琳家的女孩》和凯拉·奈特莉主演的《赎罪》也有出场。2011年，加入HBO电视剧《权力的游戏》剧组饰演了艾德·史塔克收为养子兼人质的席恩·葛雷乔伊。同年还在电影《Powder》饰演了主角Wheezer。2013年，出演了短片《The Body》，凭借此片获得2014年CinEuphoria奖国际单元短片最佳男演员的提名。2014年，在基努·里维斯主演的动作电影《疾速追杀》里饰演了Iosef Tarasov。
data.name: 阿尔菲·艾伦

data.biography:
阿爾菲·艾倫（Alfie Allen），1986 年 9 月 12 日出生於英國倫敦漢默史密斯，英國男演員。

1988 年登上小銀幕，在電視劇《The Comic Strip Presents. . . 》飾演了一個嬰兒。隨後在電影《伊麗莎白》裏飾演了小角色。斯嘉麗·約翰遜主演的電影《華麗孽緣》和凱拉·奈特莉主演的《愛･誘･罪》也有出場。2011 年，加入 HBO 電視劇《權力的遊戲》劇組飾演了艾德·史塔克收為養子兼人質的席恩·葛雷喬伊。同年還在電影《Powder》飾演了主角 Wheezer。2013 年，出演了短片《The Body》，憑藉此片獲得 2014 年 CinEuphoria 獎國際單元短片最佳男演員的提名。2014 年，在基努·裏維斯主演的動作電影《殺神 John Wick》裏飾演了 Iosef Tarasov 。
data.name: 阿爾菲·艾倫

data.biography:
Alfie Evan Allen, 12 Eylül 1986 tarihinde Hammersmith, Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Gösteri dünyasının tam kalbinde yer alan bir ailede doğan Allen'ın babası aktör Keith Allen, annesi film yapımcısı Alison Owen ve ablası ise ünlü şarkıcı Lily Allen'dır. Hatta ablasının kendisi hakkında yazdığı "Alfie" şarkısı popüler kültürde yer etmiş olsa da, Alfie Allen kendi yeteneğiyle bu gölgeden sıyrılıp uluslararası bir aktör olmayı başarmıştır. St John's College ve Fine Arts College'da eğitim aldıktan sonra oyunculuk kariyerine odaklanmıştır.

Kariyerine annesinin yapımcılığını üstlendiği "Elizabeth" (1998) ve "Cody Banks 2: Ajan Aranıyor" (Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London) (2004) gibi filmlerde küçük rollerle başlamıştır. Daha sonra Keira Knightley ile birlikte "Kefaret" (Atonement) (2007) ve "Boleyn Kızı" (The Other Boleyn Girl) (2008) gibi prestijli dönem filmlerinde yer alarak deneyim kazanmıştır. 2008 yılında Daniel Radcliffe'in başrolünde olduğu "Equus" adlı tiyatro oyununda onun yerini alarak sahneye çıkması, oyunculuk yeteneğinin ciddiye alınmasını sağlayan önemli adımlardan biri olmuştur.

Ancak Alfie Allen'ı dünya çapında bir yıldıza dönüştüren proje, HBO'nun televizyon tarihine geçen dizisi "Taht Oyunları" (Game of Thrones) (2011-2019) olmuştur. Dizide canlandırdığı Theon Greyjoy karakteri, sekiz sezon boyunca belki de hikayenin en karmaşık ve zorlu değişimlerinden birini yaşamıştır. Kibirli bir gençten, ihanet eden bir prense, ardından "Reek" (Leş) adıyla işkence görüp kimliğini yitiren bir tutsağa ve nihayetinde kefaretini ödeyen bir kahramana dönüşen Theon'u canlandırmasındaki başarısı, eleştirmenlerden büyük övgü toplamıştır. Bu performansı ona 2019 yılında Primetime Emmy Ödülleri'nde "Drama Dizisinde En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu" adaylığı kazandırmıştır.

Dizi devam ederken sinema dünyasında da akılda kalıcı roller üstlenmiştir. Özellikle Keanu Reeves'in başrolünde olduğu aksiyon klasiği "John Wick" (2014) filminde canlandırdığı Iosef Tarasov karakteriyle dikkat çekmiştir. John Wick'in köpeğini öldürerek tüm olaylar zincirini başlatan şımarık mafya oğlu rolü, filmin katalizörü olmuş ve Allen'ın "kötü karakter" yaratmadaki başarısını kanıtlamıştır. Daha sonra Shane Black'in yönettiği "Predator" (The Predator) (2018) filminde ve Taika Waititi'nin Oscar ödüllü filmi "Tavşan Jojo"da (Jojo Rabbit) (2019) Sam Rockwell'in sadık yardımcısı Finkel rolüyle komedi yeteneğini sergilemiştir.

Son dönemde televizyon projelerine ağırlık veren Allen, gerçek olaylara dayanan suç draması "White House Farm" (2020) dizisinde ve II. Dünya Savaşı sırasında İngiliz Özel Hava Servisi'nin (SAS) kuruluşunu anlatan BBC yapımı "SAS: Rogue Heroes" (2022-günümüz) dizisinde Jock Lewes karakteriyle başrolde yer alarak kariyerini başarıyla sürdürmektedir.

Lorene Scafaria (born May 1, 1978) is an American filmmaker, playwright, musician, and actress. She wrote and directed the films Seeking a Friend for the End of the World (2012), The Meddler (2015), and Hustlers (2019), as well as writing the film Nick & Norah's Infinite Playlist (2008).

Scafaria directed the Succession (2018–2023) episodes "Too Much Birthday", "Honeymoon States", and "Living+". She earned nominations for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Directing for a Drama Series for "Too Much Birthday" and "Living+", in addition to a nomination for the Directors Guild of America Award for Outstanding Directing – Drama Series for "Too Much Birthday".

data.biography: Award winning Canadian/American actor, producer and director Paul Black grew up in Kelowna, British Columbia. Shortly after graduating high school he attended VFS in Vancouver to study acting and filmmaking. Following his graduation at VFS-Vancouver he then moved to Los Angeles to pursue work in the entertainment industry. He is known for projects including S.W.A.T.-CBS, The Offer-Paramount+, Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi, Web Of Make Believe-Netflix, Workaholics-Comedy Central, Acting Out, The Masked Singer-FOX and Shooter. His hobbies include fly fishing, surfing, skateboarding and wake-boarding.

Ayelet Zurer (born 28 June 1969) is an Israeli TV and film actress. She began her career on the Israeli teen drama Inyan Shel Zman and has starred in numerous Israeli TV and film roles. She received awards for Best Actress at the Israeli Academy Awards in 2003 and Best Actress by the Israeli Academy of Television in 2006 and 2013.

Zurer has also appeared in numerous Hollywood films, such as Munich (2005), Vantage Point (2008), Angels & Demons (2009), Man of Steel (2013), and Ben-Hur (2016). She also portrayed Vanessa Marianna-Fisk in the Marvel Cinematic Universe television series Daredevil (2015–2018) and its revival series Daredevil: Born Again (2025–present).

data.biography: Ayelet Zurer (Tel Aviv, 28 de junho de 1969) é uma atriz Israelense. Ganhou notoriedade por suas interpretações em Nina's Tragedies, Adam Resurrected, Munique e Angels & Demons (Anjos e Demônios). É uma das atrizes mais aclamadas pela crítica especializada em seu país natal. Zurer, que apareceu em diversas séries de televisão e filmes israelenses, foi indicada para diferentes prêmios do Festival de Cinema de Jerusalém, da Academia de Cinema de Israel e da Academia de Televisão de Israel. Venceu os prêmios de Melhor Atriz por seus papeis em Nina's Tragedies e Betipul, uma série dramática que foi adaptada posteriormente pela HBO para o contexto americano, com o nome de In Treatment (Em Terapia).

data.biography:
Leonard Simon Nimoy (March 26, 1931 – February 27, 2015) was an American actor, film director, poet, musician and photographer. Nimoy's most famous role is that of Spock in the original Star Trek series 1966–1969, multiple films, television and video game sequels.

Nimoy began his career in his early twenties, teaching acting classes in Hollywood and making minor film and television appearances through the 1950s, as well as playing the title role in Kid Monk Baroni. In 1953, he served in the United States Army. In 1965, he made his first appearance in the rejected Star Trek pilot, "The Cage", and would go on to play the character of Mr. Spock until 1969, followed by seven further films and a number of guest slots in various sequels. His character of Spock generated a significant cultural impact and three Emmy Award nominations; TV Guide named Spock one of the 50 greatest TV characters. Nimoy also had a recurring role in Mission: Impossible and a narrating role in Civilization IV, as well as several well-received stage appearances. Nimoy's fame as Spock is such that both his autobiographies, I Am Not Spock (1977) and I Am Spock (1995) detail his existence as being shared between the character and himself.

Nimoy was born to Yiddish-speaking Orthodox Jewish immigrants from Iziaslav, Ukraine. His father, Max Nimoy, owned a barbershop in the Mattapan section of the city. His mother, Dora Nimoy (née Spinner), was a homemaker. Nimoy began acting at the age of eight in children's and neighborhood theater. His parents wanted him to attend college and pursue a stable career, or even learn to play the accordion—which, his father advised, Nimoy could always make a living with—but his grandfather encouraged him to become an actor. His first major role was at 17, as Ralphie in an amateur production of Clifford Odets' Awake and Sing!. Nimoy took Drama classes at Boston College in 1953 but failed to complete his studies, and in the 1970s studied photography at the University of California, Los Angeles. He has an MA in Education and an honorary doctorate from Antioch University in Ohio. Nimoy served as a sergeant in the U.S. Army from 1953 through 1955, alongside fellow actor Ken Berry and architect Frank Gehry.
data.name: Leonard Nimoy

data.biography: Leonard Simon Nimoy war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Regisseur, Filmproduzent, Autor, Musiker und Fotograf. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte er mit der Science-FIction-Fernsehserie „Raumschiff Enterprise“ (Star Trek) in der Rolle des Mr. Spock, in der er zwischen 1966 und 2013 mit Unterbrechungen über einen Zeitraum von fast fünfzig Jahren in mehreren darauf basierenden Film- und Fernsehproduktionen zu sehen war.

Pochodzi ze średnio zamożnej rodziny żydowskiej. Był studentem Boston College i Antioch College, studiował aktorstwo w Pasadena Playhouse. Grał drugorzędne role w filmach, m.in.: "Rhubarb" (reż. Arthur Lubin), "Francis Goes to West Point" (reż. A. Lubin), "The Brain Eaters" (reż. Bruno VeSota), "The Balcony" (reż. Joseph Strick), "Valley of Mystery" (reż. Józef Lejtes), "Aresztuję cię, przyjacielu" (reż. Sam Wanamaker), "Inwazja porywaczy ciał" (reż. Philip Kaufman). Sławę zawdzięcza sugestywnej postaci doktora Spocka w bardzo popularnym serialu TV "Star Trek", wokół którego powstał cykl filmów kinowych. Występował także w serialach: "Mission: Impossible" (1969-1971), "Search of…". Odniósł sukces na Broadwayu w sztuce Petera Shaffera "Equus" (1977), a także w spektaklu "Vincent", o van Goghu. Opublikował kilka zbiorów swoich utworów poetyckich ("You and I", "I Thing of You") i autobiograficzne "I Am Not Spock" (1975). Podkładał także głos w bajce "Transformers- The movie" dowódcy niecnych Decepticonów, Galvatronowi.

Leonard Simon Nimoy (* 26. März 1931 in West End, Boston, Massachusetts; † 27. Februar 2015 in Bel Air, Los Angeles, Kalifornien) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Regisseur, Filmproduzent, Autor, Musiker und Fotograf. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte er mit Star Trek in der Rolle des Mr. Spock, in der er zwischen 1965 und 2013 mit Unterbrechungen über einen Zeitraum von fast fünfzig Jahren in Raumschiff Enterprise und mehreren darauf basierenden Film- und Fernsehproduktionen zu sehen war.

伦纳德·尼莫伊（Leonard Nimoy）是美国演员、电影导演、诗人、音乐家和摄影师。尼莫伊最著名的角色是 1966 年至 1969 年原版《星际迷航》系列、多部电影、电视和视频游戏续集中的斯波克。

尼莫伊在二十出头时开始了他的职业生涯，在好莱坞教授表演课程，并在 1950 年代出演过少量电影和电视，并在 Kid Monk Baroni 中扮演主角。1953年，他在美国陆军服役。1965 年，他首次出现在被拒绝的《星际迷航》飞行员“笼子”中，并继续扮演斯波克先生的角色直到 1969 年，随后又出演了七部电影和各种续集中的一些客串角色。他饰演的斯波克产生了重大的文化影响，并获得了三项艾美奖提名;电视指南将斯波克评为 50 位最伟大的电视角色之一。尼莫伊还在《碟中碟中谍》中反复扮演角色，在《文明IV》中担任旁白角色，以及几次广受好评的舞台表演。尼莫伊作为斯波克的名气如此之大，以至于他的自传《我不是斯波克》（1977）和《我是斯波克》（1995）都详细描述了他的存在是角色和他自己共享的。

尼莫伊出生于乌克兰伊齐亚斯拉夫的讲意第绪语的东正教犹太移民。他的父亲马克斯·尼莫伊（Max Nimoy）在该市的马塔潘（Mattapan）区拥有一家理发店。他的母亲多拉·尼莫伊（Dora Nimoy）是一名家庭主妇。尼莫伊八岁时开始在儿童和社区剧院表演。他的父母希望他上大学，追求稳定的职业，甚至学习演奏手风琴 - 他的父亲建议，Nimoy总是可以以手风琴为生 - 但他的祖父鼓励他成为一名演员。他的第一个主要角色是在 17 岁时，在克利福德·奥德茨 （Clifford Odets） 的业余制作中饰演拉尔菲 （Ralphie） 清醒和唱歌！尼莫伊于1953年在波士顿学院上戏剧课，但未能完成学业，并于1970年代在加州大学洛杉矶分校学习摄影。他拥有俄亥俄州安提阿大学的教育硕士学位和荣誉博士学位。1953 年至 1955 年，尼莫伊与演员肯·贝瑞 （Ken Berry） 和建筑师弗兰克·盖里 （Frank Gehry） 一起担任美国陆军中士。
data.name: 伦纳德·尼莫伊

data.biography:
倫納德·尼莫伊（Leonard Nimoy）是美國演員、電影導演、詩人、音樂家和攝影師。尼莫伊最著名的角色是 1966 年至 1969 年原版《星空奇遇記》系列、多部電影、電視和視頻遊戲續集中的斯波克。

尼莫伊在二十出頭時開始了他的職業生涯，在好萊塢教授表演課程，並在 1950 年代出演過少量電影和電視，並在 Kid Monk Baroni 中扮演主角。1953 年，他在美國陸軍服役。1965 年，他首次出現在被拒絕的《星空奇遇記》飛行員“籠子”中，並繼續扮演斯波克先生的角色直到 1969 年，隨後又出演了七部電影和各種續集中的一些客串角色。他飾演的斯波克產生了重大的文化影響，並獲得了三項艾美獎提名; 電視指南將斯波克評為 50 位最偉大的電視角色之一。尼莫伊還在《碟中碟中諜》中反覆扮演角色，在《文明 IV》中擔任旁白角色，以及幾次廣受好評的舞台表演。尼莫伊作為斯波克的名氣如此之大，以至於他的自傳《我不是斯波克》（1977）和《我是斯波克》（1995）都詳細描述了他的存在是角色和他自己共享的。

尼莫伊出生於烏克蘭伊齊亞斯拉夫的講意第緖語的東正教猶太移民。他的父親馬克斯·尼莫伊（Max Nimoy）在該市的馬塔潘（Mattapan）區擁有一家理髮店。他的母親多拉·尼莫伊（Dora Nimoy）是一名家庭主婦。尼莫伊八歲時開始在兒童和社區劇院表演。他的父母希望他上大學，追求穩定的職業，甚至學習演奏手風琴 - 他的父親建議，Nimoy 總是可以以手風琴為生 - 但他的祖父鼓勵他成為一名演員。他的第一個主要角色是在 17 歲時，在克利福德·奧德茨 （Clifford Odets） 的業餘製作中飾演拉爾菲 （Ralphie） 清醒和唱歌！尼莫伊於 1953 年在波士頓學院上戲劇課，但未能完成學業，並於 1970 年代在加州大學洛杉磯分校學習攝影。他擁有俄亥俄州安提阿大學的教育碩士學位和榮譽博士學位。1953 年至 1955 年，尼莫伊與演員肯·貝瑞 （Ken Berry） 和建築師弗蘭克·蓋裏 （Frank Gehry） 一起擔任美國陸軍中士。
data.name: 倫納德·尼莫伊

data.biography:
Harve Presnell (September 14, 1933 – June 30, 2009) was an American actor and singer. He began his career in the mid 1950s as a classical baritone, singing with orchestras and opera companies throughout the United States. His career reoriented away from classical music to musical theatre in 1960 after Meredith Willson cast him in the lead role of his new Broadway musical The Unsinkable Molly Brown. His portrayal of "Leadville Johnny" was a resounding success and he reprised the role in the 1964 film version of the musical, winning a Golden Globe Award for his portrayal.

Presnell went on to star in a few more films during the 1960s, but by the early 1970s that aspect of his career came to a standstill. From 1970 to 1995 he mostly worked as a musical theatre performer on Broadway, the West End, and in touring productions out of New York. In his early 60s, Presnell saw a resurgence in his movie career which lasted until his death. He portrayed character roles in films like Fargo (1996), Saving Private Ryan (1998), and Flags of Our Fathers (2006). He also appeared on television as Mr. Parker in The Pretender and Lew Staziak in Andy Barker, P.I.. He had recurring roles on Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman and Dawson's Creek.

data.biography:
Harve Presnell (gebürtig: George Harvey Presnell; * 14. September 1933 in Modesto, Kalifornien; † 30. Juni 2009 in Santa Monica, Kalifornien) war ein US-amerikanischer Film- und Theaterschauspieler.

Harve Presnell absolvierte nach dem Besuch der High School die University of Southern California und ließ sich danach zum Opernsänger ausbilden. Im Alter von 16 Jahren stand er erstmals auf der Bühne. Im November 1960 war Presnell am Broadway in dem Musical The Unsinkable Molly Brown in der Rolle des Ehemanns der Titanic-Überlebenden Molly Brown (Tammy Grimes) zu sehen. Bis Februar 1962 hatte er 532 Auftritte in dieser Rolle. Ebenfalls erfolgreich war sein Engagement in dem Musical Annie, in dem er von April 1977 bis Januar 1983 insgesamt 2.377 Mal auf der Bühne stand.

Von Anfang der 1960er Jahre an war Presnell in Filmen und Fernsehserien zu sehen. Ab Mitte der 1990er Jahre wurde er nach seiner Rolle als boshafter Schwiegervater des Autoverkäufers Jerry Lundegaard (dargestellt von William H. Macy) in dem Film Fargo der Coen-Brüder zu einem gefragten Charakterdarsteller. In so verschiedenen Serien wie Star Trek: Raumschiff Voyager, Dawson’s Creek, vor allem aber als Mr. Parker in Pretender, war er in prägnanten Rollen zu sehen. Außerdem stand er in mehrfach prämierten Filmproduktionen wie 1998 in Der Soldat James Ryan von Steven Spielberg und 2006 in Flags of Our Fathers von Clint Eastwood vor der Kamera. Eine seiner letzten Rollen spielte er 2007 als Kongressabgeordneter in der Filmkomödie Evan Allmächtig.

data.biography:
Frank Collison (born February 14, 1950) is an American actor. Trained at the American Conservatory Theatre in San Francisco, he earned his BA in theatre at San Francisco State University and helped establish a summer theatre company in the Sierra Nevadas then went on to earn an MFA in acting at UC San Diego.  Before Collison began his professional career in acting, he worked as a forest fire fighter, diaper service dispatcher and substitute teacher. Appearing in over 150 productions, Collison has worked off Broadway and in regional theaters in Boston, Denver and California. His theatrical roles have ranged from "Puck" in Midsummer's Nights Dream to "Miss Havisham" in Great Expectations to "Jacob Marley" in Christmas Carol. Frank is a founding member of Pacific Resident Theatre in Venice, California, which has won over 25 Los Angeles Drama Critics Circle Awards.

Collison began his film and television career when he moved to Los Angeles in 1984. He is perhaps best known as "Horace Bing," the hapless telegraph operator on Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman (1993) and "Wash Hogwallop" in "O Brother Where Art Thou?
data.name: Frank Collison

弗兰克在旧金山的美国音乐学院剧院接受培训，在旧金山州立大学获得戏剧学士学位，帮助在内华达山脉建立了一个夏季戏剧公司，然后继续在加州大学圣地亚哥分校获得表演硕士学位。在弗兰克开始他的演艺生涯之前，他曾担任森林消防员、尿布服务调度员和代课教师。弗兰克出演了 150 多部作品，曾在百老汇以及波士顿、丹佛和加利福尼亚的地区剧院工作。他的戏剧角色包括《仲夏夜之梦》中的“帕克”、《远大前程》中的“郝薇香小姐”，再到《圣诞颂歌》中的“雅各布·马利”。弗兰克是加利福尼亚州威尼斯太平洋居民剧院的创始成员，该剧院赢得了超过 25 项洛杉矶戏剧评论家协会奖。

弗兰克于 1984 年移居洛杉矶，开始了他的电影和电视生涯。他最出名的可能是“霍勒斯·宾”，他是《奎因医生，女药师》（1993）和《哦，兄弟，你在哪里？
data.name: 弗兰克·考利森

data.biography:
Американский актёр. Обучался в Американской консерватории в Сан-Франциско, получил степень бакалавра театрального искусства в Государственном университете Сан-Франциско. Затем он помог основать труппу летнего театра в Сьерра-Неваде, а потом получил степень магистра актёрского мастерства в Калифорнийском университете в Сан-Диего.

Коллисон наиболее известен телезрителям по роли незадачливого телеграфиста Горация Бинга в сериале «Доктор Куинн, знахарка» и дедушки Гудмана в «Мистере Пиклзе».
data.name: Фрэнк Коллисон

data.biography: Renée Elise Goldsberry (born January 2, 1971) is an American actress, singer and songwriter, known for originating the role of Angelica Schuyler in the Broadway musical Hamilton, for which she won the 2016 Tony Award for Best Featured Actress in a Musical. She has portrayed many roles on television, including Geneva Pine on The Good Wife, and Evangeline Williamson on One Life to Live, for which she received two Daytime Emmy Awards for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Drama Series nominations.

data.biography:
Renée Elise Goldsberry, geboren am 2. Januar 1971 in Santa Clara County, Kalifornien, ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Sängerin. Sie wurde international vor allem durch ihre preisgekrönte Darstellung der Angelica Schuyler Church im Broadway-Musical Hamilton bekannt, für die sie 2016 sowohl den Tony Award als auch den Grammy Award erhielt. Auch in der Filmversion des Musicals, die 2020 erschien, übernahm sie diese Rolle erneut.

Im Fernsehen wurde Goldsberry unter anderem durch ihre Rollen als Evangeline Williamson in der Seifenoper One Life to Live (1999–2007) und als Staatsanwältin Geneva Pine in der Serie Good Wife (2010–2016) bekannt. Weitere wichtige TV-Engagements hatte sie in Altered Carbon – Das Unsterblichkeitsprogramm (2018–2020), Girls5eva (seit 2021) und She-Hulk: Attorney at Law (2022).

Neben ihrer Arbeit als Schauspielerin ist sie auch als Sängerin erfolgreich und hat einen Master-Abschluss in Jazzgesang von der University of Southern California. Privat ist Goldsberry seit 2002 mit dem Anwalt Alexis Johnson verheiratet, das Paar hat zwei Kinder.

data.biography:
Nancy Anne Allen (born June 24, 1950) is an American actress. She came to prominence for her performances in several films directed by Brian De Palma in the 1970s and early 1980s. Her accolades include a Golden Globe Award nomination and three Saturn Award nominations.

The daughter of a New York City police lieutenant, Allen was raised in the Bronx, and attended the High School of Performing Arts, aspiring to have a career as a dancer. In her early twenties, she shifted her focus to acting and relocated to Los Angeles to pursue a career there. Her first major role was as Chris Hargensen in Brian De Palma's film adaptation of Carrie (1976). Allen was subsequently cast as the lead in the Robert Zemeckis-directed comedy I Wanna Hold Your Hand (1978), followed by a supporting part in Steven Spielberg's 1941 (1979).

Allen married De Palma in 1979, and her subsequent portrayal of a prostitute who witnesses a murder in his feature Dressed to Kill (1980) earned her a Golden Globe nomination for New Star of the Year. She then appeared in De Palma's neo-noir film Blow Out (1981), playing a woman implicated in an assassination. Allen and DePalma divorced in 1984.

She appeared in the science fiction films Strange Invaders (1983) and The Philadelphia Experiment (1984), and Abel Ferrara's television film The Gladiator (1986). Allen garnered mainstream fame playing Anne Lewis in Paul Verhoeven's RoboCop (1987), a role she reprised for the two sequels that followed. Other credits include Poltergeist III (1988), Limit Up (1990), and Les patriotes (1994).

Allen stepped back from acting in 2008, and became involved in cancer support after her friend, Wendie Jo Sperber, died of breast cancer. In 2010, she was named executive director of the weSPARK Cancer Support Center in Los Angeles, which was founded by Sperber.
data.name: Nancy Allen

data.biography: Nancy Anne Allen, más conocida como Nancy Allen es una actriz estadounidense conocida por sus actuaciones en los films de los años 1980 tales como; la saga Robocop, Dressed to Kill y Strange Invaders.

Debiutowała na ekranie w w wieku 7 lat. Jednym z pierwszych "dorosłych" filmów Nancy Allen był horror "Carrie". Na jego planie nawiązała romans z reżyserem Brianem De Palma, którego poślubiła w 1979 r. Małżeństwo przetrwało tylko 4 lata, ale Nancy zdołała wystąpić w kilku filmach męża. W jednym z nich, "Home Movies" pokazała, że umie też grać role komediowe. Sporą popularność zapewnił jej też udział w obrazach innych twórców. Między innymi pojawiła się w: "I Wanna Hold Your Hand" [78] Roberta Zemeckisa, "1941" [79] Stevena Spielberga, "Eksperymencie Filadelfia' [84] Stewarta Raffila i "Robocopie" [97] Paula Verhoevena. Rozwód z De Palmą spowodował, że przestała dostawać ciekawe role, odseperował ją od wielkiego świata filmowego. W roku 1992 poślubiła Craiga Shoemakera, z którym żyje do dzisiejszego dnia

南希·安妮·艾伦（Nancy Anne Allen，1950年6月24日-），美国女演员。她因在 1970 年代和 1980 年代初由布莱恩·德·帕尔马 （Brian De Palma） 执导的几部电影中的表演而声名鹊起。她的荣誉包括金球奖提名和三项土星奖提名。

艾伦是纽约市警察中尉的女儿，在布朗克斯区长大，就读于表演艺术高中，立志成为一名舞者。二十出头时，她将注意力转移到表演上，并搬到洛杉矶从事职业。她的第一个主要角色是在布莱恩·德·帕尔马（Brian De Palma）改编的电影《嘉莉》（1976）中饰演克里斯·哈根森（Chris Hargensen）。艾伦随后在罗伯特·泽米吉斯执导的喜剧片《我想握住你的手》（1978 年）中担任主角，随后在史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格的《1941》（1979 年）中担任配角。

艾伦于 1979 年与德帕尔玛结婚，她随后在他的电影《盛装杀人》（1980 年）中饰演一名目睹谋杀案的，为她赢得了金球奖年度新星提名。随后，她出演了德·帕尔玛的新黑色电影《Blow Out》（1981），饰演一名涉嫌暗杀的女人。艾伦和德帕尔玛于 1984 年离婚。

她出演了科幻电影《奇怪的入侵者》（1983 年）和《费城实验》（1984 年），以及亚伯·费拉拉的电视电影《角斗士》（1986 年）。艾伦在保罗·韦霍文（Paul Verhoeven）的《机械战警》（1987）中扮演安妮·刘易斯（Anne Lewis）而声名鹊起，她在随后的两部续集中重新扮演了这个角色。其他作品包括 Poltergeist III （1988）、Limit Up （1990） 和 Les patriotes （1994）。

艾伦于 2008 年退出演艺圈，并在她的朋友温迪·乔·斯珀伯 （Wendie Jo Sperber） 死于乳腺癌后参与癌症支持。2010 年，她被任命为 Sperber 创立的洛杉矶 weSPARK 癌症支持中心的执行董事。
data.name: 南希·艾伦

data.biography:
Nancy Anne Allen ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Nancy wuchs im New Yorker Vorort Yonkers auf, ihr Vater war Polizist.

Sie spielte in Filmen wie Das letzte Kommando (1973), in der ersten Stephen-King-Verfilmung Carrie – Des Satans jüngste Tochter (1976), in der Kriegsfilmkomödie 1941 – Wo bitte geht’s nach Hollywood (1979), Dressed to Kill (1980). Für die Rolle der Anne Lewis in den Filmen RoboCop (1987) und RoboCop 3 (1993) erfolgten weitere Nominierungen für den Saturn Award nach Das Philadelphia Experiment (1984). Danach folgte eine Rolle im Film Der Mann, der niemals starb (1994) an der Seite von Roger Moore. Zuletzt trat sie 2008 als Schauspielerin in Erscheinung.

Allen war von 1979 bis 1983 mit Brian De Palma verheiratet, von 1992 bis 1994 mit Craig Shoemaker. Ihre bisher letzte Ehe mit Randy Bailey dauerte von 1997 bis 2008.
data.name: Nancy Allen

data.biography:
Nancy Anne Allen (nata il 24 giugno 1950) è un'attrice statunitense. È diventata famosa per le sue interpretazioni in diversi film diretti da Brian De Palma negli anni '70 e nei primi anni '80. I suoi riconoscimenti includono una nomination ai Golden Globe Award e tre nomination ai Saturn Award.

Figlia di un tenente della polizia di New York, Allen è cresciuta nel Bronx e ha frequentato la High School of Performing Arts, aspirando ad avere una carriera come ballerina. Poco più che ventenne, ha spostato la sua attenzione sulla recitazione e si è trasferita a Los Angeles per intraprendere una carriera lì. Il suo primo ruolo importante è stato quello di Chris Hargensen nell'adattamento cinematografico di Carrie (1976) di Brian De Palma. Allen è stato successivamente scelto come protagonista nella commedia diretta da Robert Zemeckis Voglio tenerti per mano (1978), seguita da una parte di supporto in 1941 (1979) di Steven Spielberg.

Allen ha sposato De Palma nel 1979 e la sua successiva interpretazione di una prostituta che assiste a un omicidio nel suo film Vestito per uccidere (1980) le è valsa una nomination ai Golden Globe come nuova stella dell'anno. È poi apparsa nel film neo-noir di De Palma Blow Out (1981), interpretando una donna implicata in un omicidio. Allen e DePalma hanno divorziato nel 1984.

È apparsa nei film di fantascienza Strange Invaders (1983) e The Philadelphia Experiment (1984), e nel film per la televisione di Abel Ferrara Il gladiatore (1986). Allen ha ottenuto fama mainstream interpretando Anne Lewis in RoboCop (1987) di Paul Verhoeven, un ruolo che ha ripreso per i due sequel che seguirono. Altri crediti includono Poltergeist III (1988), Limit Up (1990) e Les patriotes (1994).

Allen ha fatto un passo indietro dalla recitazione nel 2008 ed è stata coinvolta nel supporto al cancro dopo che la sua amica, Wendie Jo Sperber, è morta di cancro al seno. Nel 2010 è stata nominata direttrice esecutiva del weSPARK Cancer Support Center di Los Angeles, fondato da Sperber.

data.biography:
Iwan Rheon (* 13. Mai 1985 in Carmarthen, Wales) ist ein britischer Schauspieler und Musiker. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte er mit seiner Rolle als sadistischer Antagonist Ramsay Bolton in der Serie Game of Thrones.

Im Alter von 17 Jahren bekam Rheon die Rolle des Macsen White in der walisischen Soap Pobol Y Cwm, die er später jedoch niederlegte, um an der LAMDA zu studieren. Es folgte seine erste namhafte Rolle im Stück Eight Miles High, das 2008 im Royal Court Theatre in Liverpool inszeniert wurde.

Ende 2008 wurde Rheon für die Rolle des Moritz Stiefel im Rock-Musical Spring Awakening gecastet. Für diese Rolle, die er vom 9. Januar 2009 bis zum verfrühten Ende des Stückes im Mai 2009 spielte, wurde Rheon für den What’s On Stage Award als bester Nebendarsteller in einem Musical nominiert. 2010 bekam Rheon den Preis des besten Nebendarstellers in einem Musical bei den Olivier Awards.

Nach dem Ende von Spring Awakening wurde er 2009 Mitglied des Hauptcasts der Serie Misfits vom E4 Channel. Die Serie handelt von fünf kriminellen Jugendlichen, die zu Sozialstunden verurteilt wurden und nach einem Gewitter alle über Superkräfte verfügen. Rheon hat die Rolle des Simon Bellamy inne, der zu Beginn durch seine Nervosität und Schüchternheit besticht, doch laut Rheon eine große Entwicklung in der Serie durchläuft. 2011 wurde er für diese Rolle in der Kategorie Drama Series als herausragender Schauspieler für die Golden Nymph nominiert. Am 20. Dezember 2011 gab Rheon über den Mikrobloggingdienst Twitter bekannt, dass er und seine Serienkollegin Antonia Thomas Misfits nach Ende der dritten Staffel verlassen würden.

Neben zwei Gastauftritten in der Comedy-Serie Grandma’s House im Jahr 2011 spielte Rheon auch in der finalen Episode der Serie Secret Diary of a Call Girl mit.

Anfang 2012 begann Rheon zusammen mit Luke Treadeaway und Matthew Lewis die Dreharbeiten zum Film Wasteland. Ein paar Monate später folgte der Film Libertador mit Édgar Ramírez, in dem er die Rolle des Daniel O’Leary spielte. 2012 wurde bekanntgegeben, dass er für David Leons Film Driven unterschrieben hat, der wie Libertador 2013 erscheinen soll.

Zuletzt wurde Rheon für die HBO-Serie Game of Thrones als Lord Ramsay Bolton und für die Sitcom Vicious mit Ian McKellen und Derek Jacobi gecastet.

2017 übernahm Rheon im Fernsehfilm Adolf the Artist die Rolle des jungen Adolf Hitler. An dessen Seite spielte Rupert Grint Hitlers Jugendfreund August Kubizek. Ebenfalls 2017 übernahm er die Rolle des Maximus in der Marvel-Serie Inhumans. In The Dirt – Sie wollten Sex, Drugs & Rock’n’Roll, der Netflix-Verfilmung der gleichnamigen Bandbiografie über Mötley Crüe, verkörperte Rheon 2019 Mick Mars.

data.biography:
Верховых Иван Иванович

Родился 9 марта 1957 года.

Окончил Саратовское театральное училище им. И А.Слонова в 1978 году (курс Ю. П. Киселева). В этом же году был зачислен в труппу Саратовского ТЮЗа, в котором проработал восемь лет. В 1985 году поступил на режиссерский факультет ВТУ им. Б. Щукина и за два года до окончания учебы создал в Саратове новый театр — АТХ (Академия театральных художеств), став его режиссером и художественным руководителем. В 2003 году был принят в коллектив Московского театра «Мастерская П. Фоменко».
data.name: Иван Верховых

data.biography:
Graduated from Saratov Theater School in 1978 (course taught by Y. Kiselev). Was inducted into the company of Saratov Youth Theater, and spent eight years there.

In 1985, Ivan applied to the department of stage acting of the Shchepkin Higher Theater School, and two years before graduation created a new theater in Saratov, called Academy of Theater Arts. There he became the theater’s artistic and stage director. Within a short period of time, Ivan was able to build a company with many young and talented actors. Five years after the theater’s establishment, the city authorities granted the request by Saratov theater circles and the theater was given a municipal status.
data.name: Ivan Verkhovykh

data.biography: Doron Bell Jr. is a Canadian-born American actor, musician, and singer. He is known for his music, acting and voice work; he voiced the character Waldo in the Netflix animated series Dinotrux as well as many other animation projects.
data.name: Doron Bell

data.biography: Doron Bell Jr.（1973年12月8日出生于魁北克省蒙特利尔市），加拿大演员。他主要以配音工作而闻名，也许最出名的是他在奇幻电视连续剧《泰坦级》中扮演欧弟的角色。
data.name: 多隆·贝尔

data.biography: 多隆·貝爾 Jr. （1973 年 12 月 8 日出生於魁北克省蒙特利爾市），加拿大演員。他主要以配音工作而聞名，也許最出名的是他在奇幻電視聯續劇《泰坦級》中扮演歐弟的角色。
data.name: 多隆·貝爾

data.biography: 中国台湾女演员。家中有父母与妹妹，毕业于天主教辅仁大学织品服装学系织品设计组(1998年入学)。在台湾综艺节目《我猜我猜我猜猜猜》中的“寻找周杰伦MTV女主角”单位甄选活动中被发掘，继而入行，因外貌清丽而有“台湾常盘贵子”的称号。入行后主要参与电视剧及广告演出，于中国大陆亦有演出经验。曾与多名中国大陆、中国香港、中国台湾一线影星等合作，表现备受注目。演了《光阴的故事》后，孙一美傻妹形象深植人心。成为新一代的“玉女掌门人”。
data.name: 陈怡蓉

data.biography: 台灣女演員。家中有父母與妹妹，畢業於天主教輔仁大學織品服裝學系織品設計組 (1998 年入學)。在台灣綜藝節目《我猜我猜我猜猜猜》中的“尋找周傑倫 MTV 女主角”單位甄選活動中被髮掘，繼而入行，因外貌清麗而有“台灣常盤貴子”的稱號。入行後主要參與電視劇及廣告演出，於中國大陸亦有演出經驗。曾與多名中國大陸、香港、台灣一線影星等合作，表現備受注目。演了《光陰的故事》後，孫一美傻妹形象深植人心。成為新一代的“玉女掌門人”。
data.name: 陳怡蓉
